steps.title: Fit f from the table
steps.content: Use the table points $(-3,0)$ and $(0,-15)$. Enter them in Desmos and run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$.

steps.title: Match the fitted equation
steps.content: The regression gives $m=-5$ and $b=-15$, so $f(x)=-5x-15$. Factor the right side: $$-5x-15=-5(x+3)$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is $f(x)=-5(x+3)$, so C is correct.
